title: Hawaiian Pizza: Yay or Nay

content:
Summer League is starting up next week, which means time to revisit our post-game food ordering menu. Should Hawaiian Pizza be on the menu or banished forever?

Background reading for educational purposes: Hawaiian Pizza and Iceland vs the Inventor

******Update May 24, 2018******

The results are in. It was a close race, but Hawaiian pizza was met with 49% disapproval vs 38% in favour and 14% indifferent. We will have to make sure we label the pizza boxes clearly on league night so as not to offend half our members!
